full_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

facts: MNIT Jaipur (Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur) is located at JLN Marg, Malviya Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302017.
Language spoken: Hindi.
Climate: Extremely high temperatures depending on season. Jaipur is known for very hot summers.
Jaipur Junction Railway Station is 9 km from MNIT Jaipur.
Gandhinagar Railway Station is 3.5 km from MNIT Jaipur.
Durgapura Railway Station is 4 km from MNIT Jaipur.
Jaipur International Airport is 5 km from MNIT Jaipur.
Sindhi Camp Bus Stand is 10 km from MNIT Jaipur.
Narayan Singh Circle Bus Stop is 6 km from MNIT Jaipur.
MNIT Jaipur has 12 boys hostels.
H1-Parijat.
H2-Chaitanya.
H3-Satpura.
H4-Lohit.
H5-Brihaspati.
H6-Kabir.
H7-Drona.
H8-Varun.
H9-Aurobindo.
H10-PG Hostel.
H15-Aravali.
H16-Chandrashekhar.
1st year students are allotted 3-sharing rooms. From 2nd year onwards, students get single rooms.
MNIT Jaipur has 3 girls hostels.
H11-Maitri.
H12-Gargi.
H14-Vinodini.

mess.assignment: Every hostel has its own mess.
mess.notes: No mess cost or mess menu data was provided by the ambassador.

facts: MNIT Jaipur has a 10 Gbps NKN (National Knowledge Network) connection.
Hostel WiFi speed is 10-25 Mbps.
LAN speed in hostels is 120-130 Mbps.
Central Library has 24x7 WiFi.
ICT Centre is available 24/7.
75% minimum attendance is mandatory at MNIT Jaipur.
FA grade (Failed due to Attendance) can be given if attendance falls below the threshold.
Some professors count attendance as part of internal marks.
Blitzschlag is a 3-day cultural fest held in February at MNIT Jaipur. It is one of Rajasthan's largest college cultural fests.
Sphinx is the technical and management fest.
MICC is an internal fest.
Other events: Freshers, Department fests, MST/Athletic Meet, Inter-Branch sports, Inter-NIT sports.
A laundry person comes twice a week at MNIT Jaipur hostels.
14 sports available at MNIT Jaipur: Athletics, Badminton, Basketball, Cricket, Chess, Football, Table Tennis, Lawn Tennis, Volleyball, Weightlifting, Powerlifting, Kabaddi, Kho-Kho, and Tug of War.
Every hostel at MNIT Jaipur has its own canteen.
A Central canteen is also available on campus.
MNIT Shopping Complex is available on campus.
PMC offers snacks, books, fruits, vegetables, and xerox services.
Cycle shops are available on campus.
Fines at MNIT Jaipur include: late physical reporting fine, late course registration fine, and disciplinary fines.
Institute gym at MNIT Jaipur is common for both boys and girls.
MNIT Jaipur has a Primary Care Dispensary with Medical Officers.
2 nursing staff are available.
Part-time Ayurvedic, Homeopathy, and Gynecologist doctors are available.
Visiting specialists: Orthopedic, Cardiologist, Psychiatrist, Ophthalmologist, Surgeon, and ENT.
Free medicines are provided for routine ailments.
Hindi is spoken in and around MNIT Jaipur.
Extremely high temperatures depending on season. Jaipur is known for very hot summers.
